name: KGS Mini Blaster
description: The Energy Blaster has long been popular for its small size, allowing it to be stuffed almost anywhere. The Mini Blaster is an attempt to capitalize on this, featuring an even smaller footprint, but even more disappointing performance. 	As with the Energy Blaster, it is decently effective in large numbers.

name: KGS Gatling Snubnose
description: A creative pirate has chopped off most of the barrel of a Gatling Gun, resulting in a much lighter and faster firing weapon. However, the downsides are much diminished range, accuracy, and muzzle velocity, combined with a lower thermal limit and a hefty cooldown time. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

name: Enginot
description: This is where I'd keep my engine. IF I HAD ONE. Don't press W.

name: Sidestep
description: The Sidestep is a short-barreled cannon designed not to cause damage, but rather to throw enough mass explosively enough to shove the ship it is mounted on sideways. Violently.

name: Explosive Boxwing Cannon
description: BOXWING EXPLODE. Fill a Boxwing's cargo space with explosives, put a brick on the accelerator, and shove it out the door.

name: Explosive Boxwing
description: It's a Boxwing stuffed with explosives.

name: Empty Boxwing Cannon
description: Just put a brick on the accelerator of a Boxwing, and shove it out the door.

name: Empty Boxwing
description: It's a Boxwing with a brick tied to the accelerator.

name: Compact Ion Flash Engines
description: A set of combined thrusting/steering engines based on the "X1050 Ion Engines", further simplified and designed for flash-printing. The resulting engine technically works, but leaks and shakes so badly the microdrone it is mounted on won't survive long.

name: Microdrone Flash Core
description: This brilliant yet terrible device, when supplied with enough power, is capable of building an entire microdrone around itself. Unfortunately, the resulting microdrone is likely to burn up shortly after the battery dies due to the heat produced by this core.

name: Microdrone Active Cooler
description: Really really tiny, but really inefficient.

name: Gyrojet
description: This weapon fires solid projectiles with rocket engines attached. Thus, it accelerates as it travels causing it to do more damage near its maximum range.

name: Reaction Beam
description: Several exotic particle beams converge at a set point and set off a huge, continuous explosion. Doesn't do a ding-dang thing if the beams don't meet, though.

name: Large Reaction Beam
description: This weapon pushes the limits of what can be done with reaction beam technology. The use of a continuous explosion of this size is questionable, given how much energy it takes to sustain. As with all reaction beams, the beam itself does no damage.

name: Plasma Gatling
description: Following the Pug incident, the value of dumping immense amounts of shield damage all at once became a hot topic among many involved. Thus, this weapon was born - a plasma cannon attached to a bank of capacitors allowing for a very fast, very hot, very energy-intensive burst of shield-shredding damage.
